mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, symbol, asset_type, direction, action, order_type, trigger_price, entrust_price, entrust_quantity, filled_quantity, avg_filled_price, realized_pnl, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM trade_order ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM trade_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM trade_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM trade_order WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_order (order_no, user_id, symbol, asset_type, direction, action, order_type, trigger_price, entrust_price, entrust_quantity, filled_quantity, avg_filled_price, realized_pnl, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{symbol}, #{assetType}, #{direction}, #{action}, #{orderType}, #{triggerPrice}, #{entrustPrice}, #{entrustQuantity}, #{filledQuantity}, #{avgFilledPrice}, #{realizedPnl}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, symbol = #{symbol}, asset_type = #{assetType}, direction = #{direction}, action = #{action}, order_type = #{orderType}, trigger_price = #{triggerPrice}, entrust_price = #{entrustPrice}, entrust_quantity = #{entrustQuantity}, filled_quantity = #{filledQuantity}, avg_filled_price = #{avgFilledPrice}, realized_pnl = #{realizedPnl}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE trade_order SET status = 'FILLED', filled_quantity = #{filledQuantity}, avg_filled_price = #{avgFilledPrice}, realized_pnl = #{realizedPnl}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
